title: goodyera cordata
intro: Goodyera cordata, also known as the rattlesnake plantain or lady-in-mist, is a perennial orchid native to North America. This plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antiseptic compounds. The health benefits of Goodyera cordata include its potential to treat various conditions such as fever, rheumatism, and skin irritations, as well as its ability to boost the immune system. Herbal preparations of Goodyera cordata can be made into teas, tinctures, and infusions, which are often used to treat various health issues.
